projectDescription: A distributed automation platform with dual-engine architecture (high-speed protocol engine and anti-detection browser engine) for high-scale account registration, orchestrating cluster workers, mail engines, and CPA/Sub2API warehouses.
keyFeatures: Dual-engine architecture: high-speed protocol engine for raw throughput and anti-detection browser engine for realistic behavior
Distributed cluster orchestration with horizontal worker scaling
Built-in mail engine supporting multiple email providers for registration flows
CPA warehouse for managing affiliate/cost-per-action account inventories
Sub2API warehouse exposing registered accounts via API for downstream consumers
Anti-detection browser with fingerprint randomization to bypass bot detection
High-scale concurrent registration across multiple platforms
Centralized task scheduling and worker health monitoring
publicApiSurface: Sub2API — HTTP API endpoints for consuming registered account inventory
CPA Warehouse — account storage and retrieval interface
Cluster management API — worker registration, task dispatch, status polling
Mail Engine API — inbox polling, verification code extraction
Protocol Engine — high-throughput registration task runner
Browser Engine — anti-detection Chromium-based task runner
